description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Draft Release that can be triggered manually, on push to master or main branches, on push of tags matching v*, and on pull requests to master or main branches with tags matching v*. Use a single windows-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up .NET 6.0.x, restores dependencies, publishes a project, downloads and includes additional data and an updater, zips the content, and drafts a GitHub release with the zipped file.
